demo.title: Deploy a community BURGERS/FTP liquidity vault on Robinhood Chain
demo.code:
deploy the vault factory on Robinhood, then create a vault for my community

-> 1. Deploy RHVaultFactory (~2.2M gas — embeds 21KB vault bytecode)
   2. Call createVault(ownerAddress, 416600, 424800, salt) — returns vault address
   3. Mint or transfer a BURGERS/FTP V4 position NFT to the vault
   4. Call vault.adoptPosition(tokenId) to activate it
   Vault is now open for public USDG deposits

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
Deploy RHVaultFactory using references/deploy-data.md (full deploy tx.data is pre-encoded)
Predict your vault address first with predictAddress(owner, 416600, 424800, salt) before spending gas
After createVault: mint a BURGERS/FTP V4 position to the vault address, then call vault.adoptPosition(tokenId)
